name: codex-secret-paste
description: Securely paste secrets into the Codex composer as redacted handles.

interface.shortDescription: Paste secrets into Codex as safe placeholders
interface.longDescription: Codex Secret Paste adds a macOS secure-paste helper and local MCP tools so secrets can be pasted into the Codex composer as redacted @secret(...) handles, then materialized into task-scoped env files without exposing plaintext in chat.
defaultPrompt: Help me securely paste an API key into Codex.
Check whether the secure paste helper is running.
